name: chatgpt-sidecar
description: Native Windows ChatGPT companion dock with drag-to-attach window targeting and crash-safe startup.

interface.shortDescription: Dock ChatGPT beside a manually selected Codex window
interface.longDescription: Sidecar Dock is a native Windows companion app that lets the user drag an Attach handle onto the exact Codex desktop window, pins itself to that window, hosts a persistent ChatGPT session, gathers bounded local Codex and repository context, and exposes crash-safe startup plus privacy-safe diagnostics.
defaultPrompt: Open the ChatGPT Sidecar Dock installation instructions.
Explain how to drag Sidecar onto the Codex window.
